summary: Phase 5 Testing Complete: Super Admin Role and i18n. Backend: 100% (15/15 tests passed). Frontend: Working with all features verified.
passed_tests: Customer cannot access super admin endpoints (403)
Unauthenticated cannot access super admin endpoints (401)
Super Admin login and access to /admin panel
Manage Admins link visible only for super_admin role
Create Admin modal and form working
Regular admin cannot see Manage Admins link
Language selector dropdown with all 11 languages
Arabic translation working with RTL support
critical_code_review_comments: Super Admin endpoints properly protected with require_super_admin() check
AdminCreate model now includes role field for creating admin or super_admin
AdminStatusUpdate model accepts status in request body (active, suspended, disabled)
Backend correctly lowercases email on admin creation
i18n configuration with 11 languages (en, es, fr, de, pt, ar, hi, zh, ja, ko, ru)
RTL support for Arabic implemented via document.documentElement.dir
LocaleContext updated to sync with i18n.js using hispaloshop_language key
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added AdminCreate.role field, AdminStatusUpdate model, fixed status endpoint to accept body
/app/frontend/src/context/LocaleContext.js - Fixed localStorage key to hispaloshop_language, added RTL support
seed_data_creation: Created test admins during testing: test_admin_ui@example.com, regular_admin_test@example.com, and various TEST_ prefixed admins (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 Super Admin and i18n fully tested. Key implementation: 1) Super Admin role with admin management capabilities at /admin/manage-admins. 2) Backend endpoints: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/super-admin/admins. 3) i18n with 11 languages and RTL support for Arabic. 4) AdminLayout.js shows 'Manage Admins' link only for super_admin role. 5) AdminManagement.js handles CRUD for admin accounts. 6) LocaleContext syncs with i18n.js for language changes.

super_admin_login.details: admin@hispaloshop.com can login and access /admin panel

manage_admins_menu.details: Manage Admins link visible in sidebar only for super_admin role

admin_management_page.details: /admin/manage-admins shows admin table with create/suspend/delete actions

create_admin.details: POST /api/super-admin/admins creates admin with name, email, password, role

delete_admin.details: DELETE /api/super-admin/admins/{id} removes admin (cannot delete self or super_admin)

regular_admin_access_control.details: Regular admin cannot see Manage Admins link and is redirected from /admin/manage-admins

i18n_language_selector.details: Language dropdown shows all 11 languages with native names

i18n_translations.details: Spanish, Arabic, and other languages translate header and UI elements

i18n_rtl_support.details: Arabic language applies RTL direction to document

bugs_fixed.fix: Added role: str = 'admin' field to AdminCreate model

bugs_fixed.issue: update_admin_status expected status as query param, frontend sent in body
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to accept AdminStatusUpdate model in request body

bugs_fixed.issue: Status endpoint only accepted 'active' and 'disabled', frontend used 'suspended'

bugs_fixed.fix: Changed all references to 'hispaloshop_language' and added RTL direction update
